worker_profile.launch_summary: pi implementer: provider=openai-codex model=gpt-5.5 reasoning=xhigh mode=fast

completed_slices.summary: Implemented terminal-run feedback plumbing with origin target artifacts, per-terminal-transition dedupe records, inert Herdr agent-send delivery through the Cockpit seam, declarative payloads, non-fatal delivery incidents, docs, and tests. Repaired the clippy too_many_arguments failure by deriving handoff evidence inside the payload builder.
tests_run: bash -lc '! rg -n "pane run|send-keys|agent send|herdr agent" src | rg -v "src/workflow/cockpit.rs|tests"'

acceptance_status.criterion: Run start can record an optional opaque origin notification target, suitable for Herdr agent names or legacy pane ids, in a daemon-owned run artifact such as .workflow/runs/<run>/origin.json; runs without an origin target preserve current behavior.
acceptance_status.evidence: src/cli.rs accepts --origin-notification-target/KHAZAD_ORIGIN_NOTIFICATION_TARGET, IPC/daemon pass it into StartOptions, src/workflow/manager.rs writes OriginNotificationTarget to Store::origin_path, and tests assert origin.json is written when set and absent/no notification when unset.

acceptance_status.criterion: Terminal feedback is emitted from the daemon terminal-summary path only after durable terminal truth exists, for completed, blocked, failed, and cancelled transitions; interrupted is explicitly excluded in v1 because daemon-restart recovery may make the origin target stale.
acceptance_status.evidence: write_terminal_run_summary writes outputs/run-summary.json before emit_terminal_run_feedback; terminal_feedback_status_supported includes completed/blocked/failed/cancelled only. terminal_notification_dedupe_is_per_terminal_transition_and_skips_interrupted asserts no interrupted notification record.

acceptance_status.criterion: Notification dedupe is durable and keyed per terminal transition, not per run, so a blocked run that later resumes and completes can produce separate blocked and completed notifications while repeated daemon/retry paths do not duplicate the same transition notification.
acceptance_status.evidence: artifact Store writes notifications/terminal-<status>.json with transition_key terminal:<status> and emit_terminal_run_feedback skips when that record exists. The terminal_notification_dedupe test writes blocked twice and completed once, asserting separate blocked/completed records.

acceptance_status.criterion: Herdr delivery is wrapped by the Cockpit seam and uses the documented inert surface herdr agent send <target> <text>; the implementation never uses pane run, Enter keystrokes, or any auto-submit path for terminal feedback.
acceptance_status.evidence: Manager calls send_default_agent_message only; Cockpit::send_agent_message delegates to HerdrCockpitAdapter::send_agent_message, which invokes herdr agent send target text. The rg guard found no terminal-feedback Herdr calls outside cockpit/tests.

acceptance_status.criterion: The feedback payload is declarative evidence only: run id, terminal status, primary reason or feed summary, final SHA or handoff readiness when available, evidence artifact paths where useful, and next_commands. It must not contain imperative instructions asking the receiving agent to act, summarize, approve, answer, merge, or push.
acceptance_status.evidence: terminal_feedback_payload builds JSON with kind, run_id, terminal_status, message/primary_failure/cancel_reason, final_sha, handoff_readiness, evidence_artifacts, and next_commands. No prompt/instruction text is generated for the receiving agent.

acceptance_status.criterion: Notification send failure, missing Herdr, missing origin target, or stale target records a non-fatal visibility event or incident and never changes run status, slice status, verification, merge, handoff readiness, or final SHA.
acceptance_status.evidence: send/read/write failures record terminal_notification_failed incidents or skipped records without returning errors to terminal summary handling. The terminal_notification_origin_target_is_artifact_and_delivery_is_nonfatal test forces Herdr delivery failure and asserts run status remains Completed.

acceptance_status.criterion: The notification entry point and origin-target artifact are shaped so later awaiting_operator, awaiting_replan, and pending-proposal notifications can reuse them without adding a second Herdr/Pi target plumbing path, but HERDR-06 does not implement mid-run attention notifications.
acceptance_status.evidence: OriginNotificationTarget is generic/opaque and Cockpit send_default_agent_message is a reusable seam; terminal notification records are transition-specific artifacts. Only terminal summary code calls the notifier, and no awaiting_operator/awaiting_replan/pending-proposal paths were added.

assumptions: Absent origin artifact means preserve current no-notification behavior; empty/malformed/stale recorded origin targets and delivery failures are visibility-only evidence.
Interrupted terminal feedback remains intentionally excluded in v1.
